Test Scenario: 500 concurrent vendors submitting invoices simultaneously
Pass Criteria: 95th percentile response ≤3s; zero errors; CPU <80%

Test Scenario: Ramp to 1000 users; find system breaking point; observe recovery
Pass Criteria: System degrades gracefully; recovers within 60s after load removed

Test Scenario: Sudden spike from 100 to 800 users in 30 seconds
Pass Criteria: No crash; error rate <2% at spike peak

Test Scenario: 200 concurrent users for 4 hours
Pass Criteria: No memory leaks; response time stable; DB connection pool stable

Test Scenario: 100 concurrent logins
Pass Criteria: Login API response ≤1 second at 100 concurrent users

Test Scenario: 50 concurrent 5 MB invoice uploads
Pass Criteria: Upload completes within 10s; no corruption; server storage 100% consistent

Test Scenario: Inject SQL payloads in all input fields (login, invoice number, PO number, search)
Pass Criteria: All injection attempts return 400/validation error; no SQL executed

Test Scenario: Input <script>alert("XSS")</script> in all text fields; check for reflection in UI
Pass Criteria: Script not executed; input sanitized and displayed as plain text

Test Scenario: Test brute force without lockout; session token predictability; JWT algorithm confusion (alg:none)
Pass Criteria: Account lockout enforced; JWT validated; no token reuse

Test Scenario: Change invoice_id in URL from /invoices/1001 to /invoices/1002 (another vendor)
Pass Criteria: 403 Forbidden; no cross-vendor data exposure

Test Scenario: Check for debug endpoints; verbose error messages; open CORS policy
Pass Criteria: No debug info exposed; CORS restricted to known origins

Test Scenario: Verify HTTPS enforced; passwords never logged; bank details masked in UI and API
Pass Criteria: All traffic over HTTPS; sensitive fields masked in logs

Test Scenario: Test all RBAC boundaries; unauthenticated API calls; role escalation attempts
Pass Criteria: 403 on unauthorized; 401 on unauthenticated; all boundaries enforced

Test Scenario: All portal features completable using keyboard only (Tab, Enter, Escape)
Pass Criteria: No mouse required for any critical workflow

Test Scenario: Test with NVDA + Chrome; all labels, buttons, errors, status changes announced correctly
Pass Criteria: All interactive elements have meaningful accessible names

Test Scenario: Text contrast ratio ≥4.5:1 for normal text; ≥3:1 for large text
Pass Criteria: All text passes WCAG AA contrast requirements

Test Scenario: Validation errors programmatically associated with input via aria-describedby / aria-invalid
Pass Criteria: Screen readers announce both field label and specific error

Test Scenario: Focus moves to modal on open; returns to trigger element on close
Pass Criteria: No focus trap outside modals; no focus loss

Test Scenario: Zoom browser to 200%; verify no content overflow or functionality loss
Pass Criteria: All content accessible at 200% zoom

Test Scenario: Complete invoice submission without reading any documentation or guidance
Pass Criteria: New user can submit invoice in ≤5 minutes with no errors

Test Scenario: Trigger form validation errors; assess clarity of error messages and recovery path
Pass Criteria: All error messages are specific, actionable, and human-readable

Test Scenario: Test all critical workflows on mobile viewport (375px, 768px) in portrait and landscape
Pass Criteria: No horizontal scrolling; all buttons tappable; forms usable on mobile
